entries.notes: ServiceNow Incident record. {instance} is the instance subdomain (e.g. mycompany, dev111222). {sys-id} is the 32-character hexadecimal sys_id. Discover sys_id via: GET /api/now/table/incident?sysparm_query=number=INC0001234&sysparm_fields=sys_id
ServiceNow Change Request. Discover sys_id via: GET /api/now/table/change_request?sysparm_query=number=CHG0001234
ServiceNow Change Task (child task of a Change Request).
ServiceNow Problem record. Discover sys_id via: GET /api/now/table/problem?sysparm_query=number=PRB0001234
ServiceNow Problem Task (child task assigned to resolve a problem).
ServiceNow Incident Task (child task of an Incident).
ServiceNow Configuration Item (CI) base class. All CMDB CIs extend this table. Discover sys_id via: GET /api/now/table/cmdb_ci?sysparm_query=name={ci-name}&sysparm_fields=sys_id,name,sys_class_name
ServiceNow Server CI (physical or virtual server). Extends cmdb_ci.
ServiceNow Database Instance CI. Represents a running database (MySQL, Oracle, MSSQL, etc.).
ServiceNow Application CI (software application installed on infrastructure).
ServiceNow VMware virtual machine CI. Other hypervisor tables: cmdb_ci_hyper_v_instance, cmdb_ci_xen_instance.
ServiceNow Network Adapter CI. Represents a NIC attached to a server or VM.
ServiceNow Storage Device CI (disk, SAN LUN, NFS mount, etc.).
ServiceNow Cloud Service Account CI (AWS account, Azure subscription, GCP project registered in CMDB).
ServiceNow IP Address CI. Represents an IPv4 or IPv6 address assigned to a network adapter.
ServiceNow Business Service CI. Top-level service used in service maps and impact analysis.
ServiceNow Web Server CI (Apache, IIS, Nginx, etc. installed on a server).
ServiceNow Network Gear CI (routers, switches, firewalls). Parent class for all network hardware.
ServiceNow HR Service Delivery case. {instance} must have the HR Service Delivery plugin activated. Discover sys_id via: GET /api/now/table/sn_hr_core_case?sysparm_query=number=HR0001234
ServiceNow HR Task (activity within an HR case).
ServiceNow HR Service catalog entry (defines an HR service offered to employees).
ServiceNow Customer Service Management (CSM) case. Requires CSM plugin. Discover sys_id via: GET /api/now/table/sn_customerservice_case?sysparm_query=number=CS0001234
ServiceNow CSM Customer Account (B2B company record). Requires CSM plugin.
ServiceNow CSM Contact (individual person associated with a customer account).
ServiceNow Security Incident Response (SIR) incident. Requires Security Incident Response plugin. Distinct from ITSM incidents (table: incident).

ServiceNow Vulnerability Response vulnerability definition. Requires Vulnerability Response plugin. Discover via: GET /api/now/table/sn_vul_vulnerability?sysparm_query=source_vulnerability_id=CVE-YYYY-NNNNN

ServiceNow Vulnerability Entry (a vulnerability instance on a specific CI). Table: sn_vul_entry. Links sn_vul_vulnerability to cmdb_ci records. NVD-sourced entries may additionally use sn_vul_nvd_entry; sn_vul_entry is the base table for all scanner-imported vulnerability instances.
ServiceNow GRC Policy and Compliance policy statement. Requires Policy and Compliance Management plugin.
ServiceNow GRC Control (a specific control requirement derived from a policy).
ServiceNow GRC Risk record. Requires Integrated Risk Management plugin.
ServiceNow Audit Management engagement (audit project). Requires Audit Management plugin.
ServiceNow Audit Task (individual work item within an audit engagement).
ServiceNow platform user record. Discover sys_id via: GET /api/now/table/sys_user?sysparm_query=user_name={username}&sysparm_fields=sys_id,user_name
ServiceNow user group (used for assignment, escalation, and approval routing).
ServiceNow platform role (defines access permissions). Discover via: GET /api/now/table/sys_user_role?sysparm_query=name={role_name}
ServiceNow Business Rule (server-side script triggered on table operations). Discover via: GET /api/now/table/sys_script?sysparm_query=name={rule_name}^collection={table_name}
ServiceNow Script Include (reusable server-side JavaScript library).
ServiceNow Scheduled Script Execution (scheduled job / cron). Discover via: GET /api/now/table/sysauto_script?sysparm_query=name={job_name}
ServiceNow Flow Designer flow. Distinct from legacy Workflow (wf_workflow). Requires Flow Designer plugin.
ServiceNow legacy Workflow (deprecated in favor of Flow Designer). Still used for approval workflows in many instances.
ServiceNow Access Control List rule (record-level security). Discover via: GET /api/now/table/sys_security_acl?sysparm_query=name={table_name}
ServiceNow UI Action (button, link, or context menu item on a form or list).
ServiceNow Update Set (container for transporting configuration changes between instances). Discover via: GET /api/now/table/sys_update_set?sysparm_query=name={update_set_name}
ServiceNow Service Catalog item (orderable item). Discover via: GET /api/now/table/sc_cat_item?sysparm_query=name={item_name}
ServiceNow Service Catalog category (grouping of catalog items).
ServiceNow Service Catalog request (container for one or more request items). Discover via: GET /api/now/table/sc_request?sysparm_query=number=REQ0001234
ServiceNow Requested Item (RITM) — a single catalog item order within a request. Discover via: GET /api/now/table/sc_req_item?sysparm_query=number=RITM0001234

ServiceNow catalog variable value (a single variable answer on a requested item). Table: sc_item_option. Links sc_req_item records to their submitted variable values. Related table sc_item_option_mtom joins variables to request items.

ServiceNow MID Server configuration record (table: ecc_agent). Naming convention: {LOCATION}-{PURPOSE}-{NNNN} e.g. NYC-DevOps-0001. Discover via: GET /api/now/table/ecc_agent?sysparm_query=name={mid_server_name}
ServiceNow Discovery schedule (defines what IP ranges to scan and when).

ServiceNow Discovery Status (a single discovery run result/log). Discover via: GET /api/now/table/discovery_status?sysparm_query=dscheduler={schedule_sys_id}&sysparm_limit=1&sysparm_orderby=sys_created_on

ServiceNow Event Management alert (correlated, deduplicated alert). Requires Event Management plugin. Discover via: GET /api/now/table/em_alert?sysparm_query=source={source_name}^message_key={alert_key}
ServiceNow raw Event (inbound event before correlation into an alert). Ingested via /api/global/em/jsonv2 endpoint.
ServiceNow Asset (financial/lifecycle view of a CI). Discover via: GET /api/now/table/alm_asset?sysparm_query=asset_tag={tag}
ServiceNow Hardware Asset (extends alm_asset for physical devices with serial numbers, purchase info).
ServiceNow Software License asset. Requires Software Asset Management plugin.
ServiceNow Knowledge Base (container for knowledge articles). Discover via: GET /api/now/table/kb_knowledge_base?sysparm_query=title={name}
ServiceNow Knowledge Article. Discover via: GET /api/now/table/kb_knowledge?sysparm_query=number=KB0001234
ServiceNow Performance Analytics indicator (metric definition). Requires Performance Analytics plugin (com.snc.pa).

ServiceNow Performance Analytics dashboard container. Requires Performance Analytics plugin. Note: ServiceNow also has a separate homepage/workspace dashboard framework (sys_portal_page) — pa_dashboards is specific to the PA module.
ServiceNow Performance Analytics widget (scorecard, chart element within a PA dashboard). Requires Performance Analytics plugin. Widget configuration options are in pa_widget_options.

ServiceNow DevOps pipeline configuration record. Requires ServiceNow DevOps plugin (com.snc.devops). Table names in the DevOps plugin are version-specific; verify the exact table name against your installed plugin version in Schema Map (sys_db_object).
ServiceNow DevOps artifact (versioned build output tracked through the pipeline). Requires DevOps plugin. Verify table name against installed plugin version.
ServiceNow DevOps deployment record (tracks what artifact was deployed, when, and to which environment). Requires DevOps plugin. Verify table name against installed plugin version.
